Fumbling Towards Ecstasy

Sarah McLachlan

analyzeUserPreference userPreference recommendedItem
    | userPreference == (Just "Memorable compositions") && recommendedItem == "Great songs"
    || userPreference == (Just "Lush vocal harmonies") && recommendedItem == "Excellent vocals"
    || userPreference == (Just "Dynamic chorus") && recommendedItem == "Blend of big arena rock sounds with pure pop melodies"
    || userPreference == (Just "Energy-filled refrains") && recommendedItem == "Catchy songs"
    || userPreference == (Just "Creative musical arrangements") && recommendedItem == "Classic keyboard tracks"
    = True
    else
        False
```
